title: Dungeons and Dragons Origin
description: Adds 17 Monsters from the D&D 5e Monster Manual
body:
This Datapack/Mod adds 17 of the monsters for the D&D 5e Monster Manual into Minecraft as playable origins.

Please view the wiki for the full Decriptions: [https://github.com/The-Architects727/DnDMonsterOrigins/wiki](https://github.com/The-Architects727/DnDMonsterOrigins/wiki)

The origins are listed below, and can be seen in more detain in the gallary:


Aarakocra

Animated Armor

Azer

Cyclops

Dryad

Githyanki

Githzerai

Gnome

Invisible Stalker

Kobold

Magmin

Merfolk

Merrow

Minataur

Specter

Umberhulk

Xorn
